prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学 为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第70名（2026年），近年排名稳定在64–70区间，属全国中上游水平；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面， 主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报涉嫌抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查，对报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第81位，评价为一般，未出现高热关注。历史投档异常记 录中未见西北大学明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，地质学获评A、考古学获评A、软件工程获评A-，共3个A-及以上学科，与该校综合类定位匹配，对相关专 业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程、计算机类等工科专业社会热度持续偏热，与物理类招生专业高度相关；本省2026年普通高考总人数约5 2.1万人，较2025年（历史类+物理类合计约35.8万人）大幅增加，按近年比例估算物理类考生约37.98万人，增幅约45.8%，竞争显著加剧。 西北大学位于陕西省西安市，属跨省招生，对江苏考生存在一定地域距离偏好影响；该校在江苏省招生人数占比较小，2025年物理类39人，属外省中等规模招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次33069名、2026年计划缩招约10.3%、本省物理类考生大幅增加约45.8%（推高位次）、声誉偏负面（推高 位次）等多重因素，缩招的供需弹性效应与考生激增的竞争压力相互对冲，但考生规模扩张的影响更为显著，预计2026年最低录取位次；预测最低位次约 31334名，区间30834–31834名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 24956 → 28908 → 35650 → 32341 → 33069, showing a fluctuating and declining trend overall, with a baseline of about 33069 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu was 39 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 39 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 35, a reduction of about 10.3% compared to 2025, which intensifies competition due to fewer spots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 70th, with a stable range of 64–70 in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to an incident involving Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature being reported for suspected plagiarism. The university has established a working group to investigate, which may suppress some applicants' enthusiasm. On Douyin, its popularity ranks 81st, rated as average, without high attention. No significant gaps in historical admission anomalies have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology received an A, Archaeology an A, and Software Engineering an A-, totaling three A- or above disciplines, matching its comprehensive positioning and attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science remain highly popular socially, closely related to the Physics Category's offered majors. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025 (approximately 358,000 for History and Physics combined). Estimated by recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are about 379,800, an increase of about 45.8%, sharply intensifying competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a cross-provincial enrollment, which may influence Jiangsu candidates due to geographical distance preferences. The university's enrollment in Jiangsu is relatively small, with 39 Physics Category spots in 2025, representing a medium scale for an out-of-province university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 33069, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 10.3%, a significant increase of about 45.8% in local Physics Category candidates (pushing rankings higher), and a somewhat negative reputation (also pushing rankings higher), the supply-demand elasticity effect of reduced enrollment and the competitive pressure from the surge in candidates offset each other, but the impact of candidate expansion is more significant. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 31334, with a range of 30834–31834.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 30834–31834, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 30800), you can focus on competitive majors like Clinical Medicine and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 31800), you should primarily choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; it ranks approximately 70th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), placing it among the upper-middle tier of comprehensive national universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to an incident involving Associate Professor Jia Qianqian of the School of Liberal Arts being accused of plagiarism. The university has established a special task force to investigate, which has somewhat suppressed application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranks 81st, with a general evaluation and no high attention. No significant admission gaps have been observed in historical admission anomaly records for Northwest University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Archaeology received an A+ rating (directly corresponding to the Archaeology major in History Category admissions), Geology received an A, and Software Engineering received an A-. Archaeology is the university's flagship discipline, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7287, a planned enrollment reduction of about 7.1% in 2026, a substantial increase of about 45.4% in History Category candidates in the province (pushing rankings higher), and a negative reputation (also pushing rankings higher), the supply-demand elasticity effect of enrollment cuts and the competitive pressure from the surge in candidates offset each other, but the impact of the expansion in candidate numbers is more significant.
